terms.description: Informal notes, scratchpad, or simple personal record
Formal report, presentation, or analysis document
Technical specification, requirements document, or protocol
User manual, guide, or documentation book
Scientific paper, journal article, or thesis
Short executive summary or paper abstract
A comprehensive summary of other documents
Transaction receipt, payment confirmation
Billing statement, request for payment
Legal agreement, terms of service, NDA
Formal cancellation of service or agreement
Form submitted to request a service, job, or benefit
Official certification, diploma, or warrant
Saved URL, reference link, or web clip
Emails, letters, chats, or other messages
Minutes or transcription of a meeting
Todo list, project plan tasks
Programming language source file or script
Structured data format, CSV, TSV, or XML/JSON data
System logs, activity trace, or journal logs
Configuration file, properties, settings
Document kind cannot be determined
